summary: Group B implemented: timeline_entry() now normalizes action/handoff/reason_for_handoff from structured payload fields with summary fallback; raw diagnostics moved behind <details> expansion in JS renderer; responsive CSS added (overflow-x:hidden, word-break, mobile breakpoints at 600px/800px); build_nicegui_console_components() updated with ui.tabs(), ui.tab(), ui.expansion(); 7 no-spend fixture tests added covering normalization, duplicate preservation, NiceGUI markers, responsive CSS, and diagnostics placement. Tasks 1.1-1.3 (inventory, model definition, overview data selection) are out of scope for Group B and remain for Group A or steward. Tasks 1.8 and 1.12 (legacy path compat, OpenSpec validation) also remain.
